text.title: Pulse Survey — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a weekly `MoralePulse` aggregate and the alert event it may trigger.

list.item: `scores` — object {enps: object {mean, median, distribution}, workload: {mean, median}, autonomy: {mean, median}, clarity: {mean, median}}
`trend_vs_prior_sprint` — object delta per axis (only when anonymity met)
`alerts_triggered` — array of alert events (may be empty)
`evidence` — object (the specific number that triggered it)

antipattern.description: `MoralePulse.scores` includes per-person breakdowns OR raw responses.

antipattern.reason: Violates r2. Suppress per-axis data until threshold met.

antipattern.description: Alert event without `due_by` ≤ 48 business hours of trigger.
Survey continues running while a prior alert's 1:1s are NOT done.
antipattern.reason: Violates r4 pause clause; running pulse without action destroys trust.
Comments are qualitative, may be de-anonymising. Surface to PM privately as separate file with a 7-day auto-delete window.

list.item: Anonymise team_id when sharing program-level dashboards.
Aggregate scores by month for retrospective trend analysis.
Convert eNPS distribution to Promoter / Passive / Detractor counts.
Comment box treated separately and auto-purged.
